findings.issue: No Fabro workflow file (fabro.yaml / fabro.json / .fabro/) is present in the generated app. The spec requires Fabro as the runtime and that the workflow runs in Daytona repository-relative. Build and execution are not orchestrated.
findings.fix: Generate a Fabro workflow definition with steps for install, lint, test, build, and artifact collection. Ensure all paths are repository-relative.

findings.issue: No Apify actor configuration or runner integration found. The spec requires Apify adapters with configurable actor IDs, fixtured fallback, and live smoke checks. Generated app only contains static fixture JSON.
findings.fix: Implement an Apify adapter module that can call Apple search/reviews and social scrapers, with environment variable or config-driven actor IDs, and a fallback to fixture data when Apify is unavailable or offline.

findings.issue: Missing /api/refresh endpoint and associated scoring engine. The spec requires POST /api/refresh to trigger data refresh, recalculating scores with acceleration, review velocity, social velocity, and review pain density.
findings.fix: Add the refresh endpoint, wire it to data adapters, and implement the scoring algorithm as specified: prioritize acceleration, review pain density, social velocity, and freshness penalties.

findings.issue: No multi-model review fanout implemented. Spec requires using OpenRouter for parallel model review (Kimi, Qwen, DeepSeek) with expensive models for scaffolding and cheap models for generation. No code found for this.
findings.fix: Create a review adapter that calls OpenRouter with the specified models, separates scaffolding vs. generation calls, and records consensus output.

findings.issue: App detail view missing social strategy, feature requests, and suggested investigation angles. Current detail endpoint returns only raw fixture data without these derived fields.
findings.fix: Enhance the app detail endpoint to compute and expose social strategy analysis, aggregated feature requests from reviews, and investigation angles based on gap analysis.

findings.issue: No CI/CD gates implemented: no Qlty checks, Promptfoo eval, or fallback eval. No artifact validator present. Spec requires these as gates.
findings.fix: Add a CI script that runs node --check, native tests, an artifact validator, attempts Qlty (warn if missing), and runs Promptfoo or a deterministic fallback eval.

findings.issue: Sorting and scoring on dashboard are not aligned with spec: fixtures are static and no growth-based scoring or week-over-week acceleration is computed.
findings.fix: Refactor dashboard API to calculate growth score, social deltas, review deltas, and opportunity score dynamically from the data, with proper sorting.

findings.issue: No smoke/live tests exist. Spec allows fixture data but requires live-source smoke checks. Only static data is present.
findings.fix: Add optional live-data smoke test that hits Apple RSS/iTunes endpoint with a small query, using a timeout and fallback, just to verify connectivity.

findings.issue: No Spec Kitty integration or recorded warning when CLI absent. Spec mandates this.
findings.fix: Add a script or pre-check step that attempts to run spec-kitty, captures any absence warning, and logs it without blocking.

suggested_next_steps: Scaffold Fabro workflow definition as top priority to satisfy runtime requirement.
Implement core adapters (Apify, Apple RSS, OpenRouter) with configurable IDs and fixture fallback.
Add /api/refresh endpoint with complete scoring engine.
Enrich app detail view with social strategy, feature requests, and investigation angles.
Set up CI pipeline with native checks, artifact validator, Qlty, and Promptfoo/fallback.
Wire smoke tests and Spec Kitty presence check.
